title: Publicly accessible @ELPonyin profile/status snippets captured without paid X API
text:
Profile metadata captured from public X page: Ponyin 𓂀 @ELPonyin. Bio: Lightbringer | Trader, Not a Caller | The Big Apes on @apesfnf | Founder of Ponyin’s Hub | Partner @TrojanOnSolana | ponyin.id | ponyin.sol | trojan.com/@Ponyinnn | Joined February 2026 | 428 following | 17K followers | 5,171 posts. Public profile timeline without login displayed '@ELPonyin hasn’t posted' despite post count, but direct status pages and search snippets were discoverable.

Direct status captured by browser: https://x.com/ELPonyin/status/2053970937771659364 — Ponyin: In crypto, U need something to make something. Thats the harsh truth. Metrics visible: 2 replies, 3 reposts, 31 likes, 1 bookmark, 2,921 views.

Search-result snippets discovered from DuckDuckGo for site:x.com/ELPonyin:
- https://x.com/ELPonyin/status/2053755138536530202 — snippet: @ELPonyin. 2h. 💬 2. 🔄 7. 🤍 24. 📊 1663. No full text available in snippet.
- https://x.com/ELPonyin/status/2038978259329925616 — Ponyin: Burning my $naruto supply as a support to community. Send it higher. Metrics snippet: 143 likes, 36 replies.
- https://x.com/ELPonyin/status/2038218246055456966 — Ponyin: I told u to buy $blackout on 8k. U fade. I told u to buy $blackout on 17k. U say its already too high. Now we new ATH ... Metrics snippet: 69 likes, 17 replies.
- https://x.com/ELPonyin/status/2049374720395776178 — snippet: @ELPonyin Apr 28 ciaa xpeacessea Apr 28. Metrics: 1962 replies, 128 reposts, 2284 likes, 659753 views. No tactical full text available in snippet.
- https://x.com/ELPonyin/status/2037933768623976814 — Ponyin: People are laughing when they hear $blackout it's gonna happen. They will cry when it happens. The narrative is ... Metrics snippet: 60 likes, 12 replies.
- https://x.com/ELPonyin/status/2034760857457188877 — Ponyin: 47k bang. Metrics snippet: 20 likes, 4 replies.
- https://x.com/ELPonyin/status/2029707012049883473 — Ponyin: God morning lads. Metrics snippet: 37 likes, 47 replies.
- https://x.com/ELPonyin/status/2037959252980199696 — Ponyin: Gasken higher pls. Metrics snippet: 28 likes, 5 replies.
- https://x.com/ELPonyin/status/2052153986833416535 — Ponyin: Gimanacaranya. Metrics snippet: 63 likes, 16 replies.

Extraction caveat: this is a thin public capture. X blocks full unauthenticated access to most timeline/replies; better evidence requires logged-in manual copy, screenshots, Obsidian clipper per-post, or external export. Treat snippets as low-to-medium evidence unless direct browser page text was visible.
